title: Fisher-Price Toddler Toy Wooden Animal Puzzle, Shape-Sorting Activity with 13 Wood Pieces for Preschool Kids Ages 2+ Years, JFG10
features: 13-piece animal-themed wooden puzzle for toddler shape-sorting play
2 ways to play! Kids can sort the shapes into the tray or stand the animals upright to act out fun stories
Includes 12 animal blocks and 1 sorting tray with guides to help kids complete the puzzle on their own
Made with wood from Forest Stewardship Council-certified sources (FSC-N004566)
Helps foster animal recognition, problem-solving and fine motor skills for toddlers and preschool kids ages 2 years and older
description: From the manufacturer Putting the Fun in Fundamental Fisher-Price wooden toys bring Montessori-style, open-ended play to your child’s hands, fostering development in simple yet super-fun ways Designed in fresh, modern styles with fun colors and patterns that engage the senses and inspire creativity Pass it on! Crafted with wood sourced from well-managed forests and arriving in FSC-certified packaging, these toys are built for play that lasts These toys help develop: Curiosity & Wonder Fine Motor Skills Cause & Effect Say hello to happier parenting Our early childhood development experts at the Fisher-Price Play Lab have been watching and learning from babies & big kids for decades. Our research helps us design toys and baby gear that foster growth & learning in the most fun ways. Because after 90 years of making toys, we know every child develops at their own pace, and we’re here to help you find the joy in every stage!
